channel.title: Writing, Art on GDLP
channel.description: Recent content in Writing, Art on GDLP

item.title: Spoke to Lomography magazine 🎞️
item.description:
2026-05-28

i did an interview with Lomography magazine. They sent me the Lomomatic 110 to try, and I took it with me on the Poor Artists book tour, and while I was out with friends.

you can read the article Staying in the Real World with Gabrielle de la Puente of The White Pube and the Lomomatic 110 <- right there

i love film : )
